description: Fix all TypeScript errors in the 6 broken TSX files. These files have JSX syntax errors caused by Unicode escape sequences (\u{XXXX}) being used directly in JSX text content. TSX interprets curly braces as expression boundaries, breaking the parse. Fix by replacing \u{XXXX} with actual emoji characters or HTML entities. Also fix bitmoji.tsx which has additional issues with <T> being interpreted as a JSX tag inside button text.
steps: Fix apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryCreator.tsx - Replace \u{1F600}, \u{1F3A8}, \u{1F3B5} on lines 152-154 with actual emoji characters (string literals in curly braces like {'emoji'} or HTML entities)

Fix apps/quantchat/src/pages/bitmoji.tsx - Line 132 has a <T> being parsed as JSX opening tag (inside button text 'T'). The file also has \u{} escapes in JSX content. Replace all unicode escapes in JSX with actual emoji characters or wrap in expressions
Fix apps/quantchat/src/pages/spotlight.tsx - Lines 128, 133, 134 have \u{} escapes in JSX. Replace with actual emoji chars
Fix apps/quantmail/src/components/FileManager.tsx - Lines 245, 282 have \u{1F465} in JSX. Replace with actual emoji
Fix apps/quantmail/src/pages/drive.tsx - Line 282 has \u{} escape in JSX. Replace with actual emoji
Fix apps/quantmail/src/pages/security.tsx - Line 374 has \u{1F511} in JSX. Replace with actual emoji

Verify: run NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --strict --jsx preserve --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target ES2017 --lib dom,dom.iterable,esnext --skipLibCheck on each of the 6 fixed files to confirm zero errors
acceptance_criteria: All 6 TSX files compile with zero TypeScript errors when checked individually with tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck
No functional changes to component behavior - only fixing the syntax of emoji rendering in JSX
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --strict --jsx preserve --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target ES2017 --lib dom,dom.iterable,esnext --skipLibCheck apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryCreator.tsx apps/quantchat/src/pages/bitmoji.tsx apps/quantchat/src/pages/spotlight.tsx apps/quantmail/src/components/FileManager.tsx apps/quantmail/src/pages/drive.tsx apps/quantmail/src/pages/security.tsx
NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run to confirm all existing tests still pass
findings: All 6 files compile cleanly. Fix approach: wrapped \u{XXXX} escapes in JSX text with string expressions ({'..'}) and used <T,> trailing comma for generic in TSX. Also fixed NodeJS.Timeout by using ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>. Prettier reformatted the files during commit (lint-staged). NODE_OPTIONS='' is required for git commit to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js error in commit-msg hook.
